product.name: 6 FT Artificial Ficus Tree 600 Leaves Faux Plants Indoor Tall with Black Pot Large Fake Tree for Home Office Living Room Decor
features: Brighten Up Your Decor: We designed our Ficus Tree artificial decor to add a touch of refreshing and uplifting greenery to your home or office decor. It maintains its vibrant green color throughout the year in any season and complements the look of any modern home.

Safe And Durable: Our faux greenery plant decorations are designed with long term use in mind. They are made using only flame-retardant materials that are safe to use around your home. The tall fake floor plant doesn’t rely on any harsh chemicals or materials while being a breeze to maintain.

Suitable For Any Space: Our home decor living room faux plant provides just the right fit for any indoor and outdoor space including bedroom, kitchen, living room, patio, porch, home office, cafes, and more to elevate its look with a touch of vibrant greenery.

Make It A Gift: Besides being an eye catching addition to your home, our faux Ficus Tree also makes a thoughtful and charming gift for friends and family. It’s the perfect gift for Housewarming, Birthdays, Christmas, Holidays, Thanksgiving, New Year’s, and more.

Easy To Clean And No Maintenance: These artificial plants for home decor indoor don’t require any watering or day to day care. They maintain their refreshing and vibrant look even in the long run. You can simply wipe them clean and can even cut them to get the look you want.
